notes: Claim-only stall: student gives 3 vague claims without naming any planet. Coach should escalate from specificity probe to hint to model-and-ask. No premature wrap.
name: planets: claim-only stall × 3 turns
promptInput: What are planets made of? Give examples.
successCriteria: States that planets are made of different materials.
Names at least two specific planets.
Describes what each named planet is made of.
hints: Think about what you know about Earth and other planets.

transcript.message: they are made of different stuff
Can you name a specific planet?
there are many kinds of planets
Here's a hint: think about Earth.
